title: Selling Ebooks Without Stripe: What Nobody Tells You Before You Choose — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're an ebook author in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, and you can't use Stripe to sell your digital products. PayPal, Gumroad, and Payhip restrict your access, leaving you with a big problem: how to get paid. This post lays out the reality of Stripe, PayPal, Gumroad, and Payhip's restrictions, and presents a permanent alternative for creators in 20+ countries. You'll learn how to bypass these restrictions and start selling ebooks online without a Stripe account. Yes, you can still get paid, even if your country or favorite platform doesn't cooperate.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Let's start with what each platform offers. Stripe is a payment processor for online transactions, but it restricts access to certain countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. PayPal allows some countries to use its services, but it requires you to verify your account, which can be a problem for creators in restricted countries. Gumroad is an ecommerce platform for selling digital products, but it also restricts access to certain countries. Payhip is a platform for selling ebooks, but it doesn't support creators in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan. Meanwhile, NOWPayments is a payment processor that works with over 300 cryptocurrencies, allowing creators in any country to receive payments without needing a traditional bank account or going through KYC verification.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Now, let's talk about how each platform handles restricted countries. Stripe, PayPal, Gumroad, and Payhip all have restrictions in place, which can make it difficult or impossible for creators in certain countries to use their services. In contrast, NOWPayments has no such restrictions, making it possible for creators in 20+ countries to use its services without worrying about being blocked. This is especially important for creators who live in countries with high inflation rates or economic instability, where traditional payment processors may not be reliable.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, NOWPayments stands out from the competition. With NOWPayments, you can receive payments in real-time, without any delays or holds. Fees are low and transparent, and you won't have to worry about surprise charges or fees for things like foreign exchange conversion. In contrast, Stripe and PayPal have higher fees and more complex pricing structures, while Gumroad and Payhip often charge extra fees for things like payment processing and transaction fees.
You can bypass PayPal's restrictions and sell ebooks online without a Stripe account by using NOWPayments.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are also important considerations when choosing a platform for selling ebooks. With NOWPayments, you can automate delivery of digital products, including ebooks, directly to your customers without any manual intervention. This means you can focus on creating more content and building your business, rather than worrying about delivering digital products to your customers. In contrast, Stripe and PayPal require manual intervention to deliver digital products, while Gumroad and Payhip often have more complex and time-consuming delivery processes.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which platform should you choose based on your situation? If you're a creator in a restricted country, NOWPayments is the clear choice for its ability to work with over 300 cryptocurrencies and lack of restrictions. If you're looking for a platform with real-time payment processing and low fees, NOWPayments is also the way to go. And if you want to automate delivery of digital products, NOWPayments is the platform to choose. The Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) is your complete store infrastructure, one payment.
